summary: Invoice Detail Modal Enhancement (Iteration 95) - Full transaction viewer now supports both invoices and POs. All backend APIs pass (10/10), all frontend UI features working. Invoice modal opens via search results and quick search, shows digital payment info, PO-specific fields, and action buttons (Edit/Verify/Void).

backend_api.GET /api/invoices/by-number/{invoice_num: PASSED - Returns full invoice with digital payment fields
backend_api.GET /api/purchase-orders/{po_id}: PASSED - Returns single PO by ID
backend_api.GET /api/expenses/{expense_id}: PASSED - Returns single expense by ID
backend_api.POST /api/verify/{type}/{id}: PASSED - Verify endpoint exists and responds

frontend_ui.Click invoice result opens modal (not na: PASSED - Modal opens on Find Transaction page
frontend_ui.Click PO result opens modal: PASSED - Same modal works for POs
frontend_ui.Quick Search opens modal for invoices: PASSED - Ctrl+K -> search -> click result -> modal
frontend_ui.Digital payment info shown: PASSED - Platform (GCash), Reference #, Fund Source (Split), Cash Portion, Digital Portion
frontend_ui.PO shows vendor field: PASSED - Vendor label with vendor name

critical_code_review_comments: InvoiceDetailModal correctly detects PO via _collection='purchase_orders' from API
Modal renders PO-specific fields (vendor, payment_status, dr_number) when isPO=true
Search results correctly differentiate invoice vs expense types - expenses navigate to /expenses page
Copy number button uses navigator.clipboard API with fallback
Verify and Void actions use PIN verification via /api/verify/{type}/{id}
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for robust testing
seed_data_creation: None - used existing invoices and POs
context_for_next_testing_agent: InvoiceDetailModal is the unified transaction viewer for both invoices and POs. It opens via TransactionSearchPage (Find Transaction) and QuickSearch (header Ctrl+K). Key data-testids: invoice-detail-modal, invoice-number, copy-number-btn, edit-btn, verify-btn, void-btn, section-detail, section-receipts, upload-qr-btn, view-qr-btn, verify-pin-dialog, verify-pin-input, verify-confirm-btn, void-dialog, void-reason-input, void-pin-input, void-confirm-btn. When searching, results may include both expenses and POs with same number - click the one with 'Purchase Order' badge to open PO modal.

verified_test_ids.upload-qr-btn: Upload via Phone button in Receipts tab
verified_test_ids.view-qr-btn: View on Phone button in Receipts tab
